org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder

Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Chat client API.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch
Tool Search Tool Advisor package for dynamic tool discovery and search capabilities.

    Description

    Creates a new Builder instance for constructing a ToolCallingAdvisor.

    Creates a shallow copy of this builder with all current settings.

    Factory method called by ToolCallingAdvisor.Builder.copy() to create the blank builder instance that will receive the copied fields.
